overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a cowboy character exploring a foggy, mountainous grassland. The character walks through tall grass and wildflowers, stops to examine animal remains, and continues along a winding hillside trail as fog density increases.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall grass and wildflowers across the open hillside with distant mountain views

entered.detail: dense tall grass with white and red wildflowers covering the hillside
misty mountain peaks visible on the horizon under cloudy skies
small pine trees dotting the distant landscape

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a vast open meadow covered in tall grass and wildflowers. Distant mountains are visible through the hazy morning light, with scattered pine trees on the horizon. The camera follows steadily from behind as the character moves across the terrain.

events.description: character discovers and examines a dead animal carcass, camera shifts to overhead view to inspect the remains

agents.ego_description: stopping to crouch down and inspect the skeletal remains and carcass of a dead animal lying in the grass

entered.detail: dead animal bones and carcass with visible skull lying in the tall grass

segments.scene_description: The character stops walking and approaches a dead animal carcass in the grass. The camera pans down to an overhead view showing the skeletal remains and skull. After a brief inspection, the character stands and prepares to continue.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy mountain trail with large boulders

events.description: fog density increases significantly, obscuring the valley below as character descends the trail

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding dirt path through increasingly foggy terrain with large rock formations

entered.detail: narrow winding dirt path cutting through the grass and rocks
massive gray boulders scattered along the hillside trail
thick white fog rolling through the valley and obscuring distant views

segments.scene_description: The character continues along a dirt trail that winds through the hillside. Large boulders appear scattered along the path as the fog thickens significantly, creating a misty atmosphere that obscures the valley below. The terrain becomes rockier as the character progresses along the trail.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vast, hazy meadow that gradually transforms into a rocky, fog-shrouded hillside. It begins with the camera following steadily behind a character walking through tall grass and wildflowers under a soft morning light with distant mountains on the horizon. As the character pauses, the camera pans down to an overhead view to inspect a skeletal animal carcass resting in the grass before shifting back to the character's movement. The scene then transitions as the character follows a winding dirt trail, where the terrain becomes increasingly rocky and scattered with large boulders. Finally, the atmosphere shifts as the fog thickens significantly, obscuring the valley below and enveloping the hillside in a dense mist.
